This is a virtual repo that's created to deploy all the VEDA services (veda-backend, veda-auth, veda-stac-ingestor, veda-data-airflow) at once. It makes use of sub modules, composite actions within the other repos and github workflows for the deployment. It also takes care of the dependency between the deployments and runs them in proper order.
